entry.title: 2026 June: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: Introduction One of the bands I picked for the last list seems…
entry.content:
Introduction

One of the bands I picked for the last list seems to be using an AI vocal (not voacoloid or VTuber, they’re different) so will not be considered for inlcusion again. A band called ZZOA almost made it on this list but also sem to potentially be AI. Another band described as a Virtual Idol Unit have been taken off the list because I’m not sure. They could effectively be just a bunch of VTuber types singing actual songs but it is too hard to tell.

Introduction and Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4r7WY80OA4m5uvAKSf5QRJ?si=LH4UXiSXTN2QSe-IzINs2w

Tidal Playlist: https://tidal.com/playlist/a502bca6-22d2-4f98-9ec3-e83ceb2c5e76

Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V6-Q417W1qXrmYTheBV2-9In&si=t-gH2fp0qWKZJyDN

Initial Shortlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V688JFb6_SfchTKhavX47Jbr&si=ZB5LFdcTDcEOin2v

Tidal : https://tidal.com/playlist/bc57ef07-0a3f-48f4-a279-d2b67cf127c1

829 songs listened to at time of writing. Mostly youtube and a few on bandcamp.

Almeda - Broken Record

Country of Origin: Amarehk

Youtube Views: 120,814

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/187PhQNVowHs4jJj4Ebzzu?si=19641b6ab94d45b7

Video Link: https://youtu.be/pDLhDgUni68?si=CL5vJU7p8CbcfsMO

Did this song get in because the singer starts the song with a cat and singing meow meow meow meow?

Me-me-me-meow-meow-meow-meow-meow-meow-meow

Yes.

Yes it did.

tripleS (트리플에스) - Baby Flower

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 32 million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0kxwgvVOuUxzkeo3tc0Dh4?si=ea0d0861b93f4206

Video Link: https://youtu.be/6q8UMVXhXsE?si=IPIRCPaGRCx9Adbp

Here is the Kpop song that got stuck in my head. Like many of these fluffy sounding songs it seems to be all nice until you read the lyrics. More trauma flags than Bakemonogatari.

BBB - The Trap (feat. Kasane Teto)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 1.6k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6xlYroflrtQM5zgDdSmcqh?si=aaffd121ab88494d

Video Link: https://youtu.be/0QtaHnPCAxA?si=48w3w5L8Jn55aLS3

The video probably uses AI generated imagery. Some of it has that vibe. As far as I can tell the music producers are real people.

Obviously Kasane Teto is more real than most actual people. She is a cat.

BAND-MAID - ENERGETIC

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 82k (after 20 hours)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/136RFhFtC1lDlKgXw7eXM3?si=56a33e97314542e5

Video Link: https://youtu.be/NpZjslVGhbE?si=e03S0cM8fQOwB3vi

Need a song to get your head in the right spacwe for another day of living? Solved problem.

Flying Dog (플라잉독) - Tonight (feat. Sena (윤세나))

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 589 (robbed, probably because there’s a dog in the band name.)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2yewzEeXIZnNqEm2adBLkA?si=933dda789d0944e7

Video Link: https://youtu.be/9N_El260s4M?si=tnW_LH6Sl49FQrvt

This is a pretty solid rock song.

I have no idea what is happening in the video but I love it. Even though he’sa dog.

Why is the frame invidible?

ano -「貸しっぱなしデスティニー」×『新劇場版☆ケロロ軍曹』

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 810k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/71xlmmNpMLE6tlnR8sWHdv?si=5929bf274ef74081

Video Link: https://youtu.be/y0URm3qCTpc?si=IsqcqO2GO7eXZ7-m

ano has probably heard about genre w.r.t songs. She just doesn’t care. I am presuming this is a theme song to an anime I’m never going to watch.

I think the title translates to ‘Destiny Lent Out.’

Meet Me @ The Altar - Strung Out

Country of Origin: Amarehk

Youtube Views: 3.9k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6hI2j5A91BzhH3qQbFAXJx?si=5ea03c7f359d496e

Video Link: https://youtu.be/eY2M9ZbzSuQ?si=_FUA8OMBAulVNBzp

This one could have ended up on last month’s ‘dere list.

The visualiser is awful. The song is fine.

Valentia Ploy - Under Construction

Country of Origin: Italy / Thailand

Youtube Views: 27k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/4Y3253lAyzFqLhcUgYEY62?si=7abed478bf654826

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Mk-wH7bU85I?si=UVlCP-hOThbgquGp

I was never broken, I’m under construction

Alice U (앨리스유) - 도주 (Runaway)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 128k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7Hqv8aPOTZTZAJckXZL05J?si=35dfce612b94408a

Video Link: https://youtu.be/pIIarXf-5ok?si=TRRPioPgT2gvdwJU

Not Kpop.

Phantom Siita - Horror Queen

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 778k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/4xfm7kSYoRvlAhqA7JlZzd?si=86045966a2504ac3

Video Link: https://youtu.be/X7Ht9CULonY?si=oRjaOqp8l-JzFgAv

Check song. Is it by Phantom Siita? Put on list.

That’s the process. Video looks sloppy.

Runners Up - Subtitle

Don’t really have a theme for the runner up songs.

KLP48 - Kerana ku Suka (That’s Why I Love??)

Country of Origin: Malaysia

Youtube Views: 337k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2uLXiV0hDM4g9zTKgwChk1?si=18fcb5470f6e45b7

Video Link: https://youtu.be/EDliuALaUm0?si=CCQ9NY0I3qg1Iw91

I watched the video and it seems to be about confessing to the one you love and then accidentally confessing your love to your lteacher? I’m not sure. It also seems to be a song shared between the XXX48 sister groups so I will make a little playlist and add all the versions I can find.

Why I Love Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLbF8ngevoDKc&si=IESQW_vPXzF2XgGL

Version prime has 24 million views.

Icona Pop - Butterfly Feelings

Country of Origin: Sweden

Youtube Views: 35k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7HJdIi4rzQqj5LkUQfZWRb?si=86c7cf45c90c4ebc

Video Link: https://youtu.be/AMW1Zq9RbIU?si=JUKIdNQ8NUMea-eo

Did you ask for Swedish Synth-Pop?

Here it is.

Karencici - 100 Degress

Country of Origin: Amarehk

Youtube Views: 436k

Spotify Link: https://tidal.com/track/531960102/u

Video Link: https://youtu.be/SwRNkQW9paM?si=VsqM8u2Djfm2eUW0

A Chinese-American artist signed to a Korean label. That explains the vibe here.

I presume she is 100 Amercian degress and not proper degrees.

Endmeow

This list was a nightmare. Just listen to the longlist I was still adding songs to it earlier today.

Like this one:

https://youtu.be/TlujgznFKyI?si=in-wk7Sxc9IrHqfTV

https://open.spotify.com/track/0H8cP2L0uH9jWmVEMc8FHN?si=22b13ef5085f4694

A wee bit of Kawaii-core.

entry.title: 2026 May: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: Introduction Introduction and Links Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0dzbfltKof49fcn3ftt8sP?si=r5yVKVx4SPSXM8eVXlPw4A Tidal Playlist: https://tidal.com/playlist/465d304f-7901-4e90-9f82-66a68aedaaee Youtube Playlist:…
entry.content:
Introduction

Introduction and Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0dzbfltKof49fcn3ftt8sP?si=r5yVKVx4SPSXM8eVXlPw4A

Tidal Playlist: https://tidal.com/playlist/465d304f-7901-4e90-9f82-66a68aedaaee

Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V6_UptCtHXqGs6NBuA-yr840&si=SKouwytcKbcRnnRu

Initial Shortlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V692BA9FA5oR5DQxwOkbQzCJ&si=a6K8Nkxv8DSKYnmR

Tidal : https://tidal.com/playlist/7d136ee9-0cd2-4a9a-8cbe-879e409563c7

979 songs listened to at time of writing. Mostly youtube and a few on bandcamp.

Really difficult this month. Also two songs are not on Spotify or Tidal

MEMI - BADidea

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 367k in three weeks

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6sm6Pd6GTZ3erJmCzSOcW5?si=6c17127270bd4cb4

Video Link: https://youtu.be/i_-pZiZJ7MQ?si=mbxQf-YFV_W2m_3i

Fan Site: https://memi.rocks/about

Starting lyrics:

I think I’m dying. I’m no longer satsified.

This was one of the first songs my musical cat ears sniffed out, my ears can sniff, and it still lives in my head. Awesome song, awesome video, vibralicious vibe.

Yeah you like it!

Mopar Stars - Feast for the Smile

Country of Origin: United American States

Youtube Views: 865 over three weeks.

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2K0oBGALk7OcgHhWJRmPJW?si=5feef0454b334cfa

Video Link: https://youtu.be/pfUNP_Bmm4Q?si=CAQt_ATdqlKlZmd8

Bandcamp Link: https://moparstars.bandcamp.com/

Indie banger. Deserves more views

meimei - Melancholy Girl (鳴命(めいめい - 憂鬱なあの子)

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 1.2k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/61A2LFWixFSfxinV407m1k?si=c577b411ece6420b

Video Link: https://youtu.be/pmmKy8yFUDQ?si=scOV6WO13ndZP34d

Just dropped a new album. Pop rock with a melachnolic yet hopeful feel. Or possibly not. They might be singing about the joy of suicide based on some of the song names.

Lee Juyeon - Rock ‘N’ Roll Star (J Rock Version)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 3.3k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0f7G5RuZDAnXzr2ck1hWkB?si=1e70430d93644f03

Video Link: https://youtu.be/3heCT6pyOiU?si=Q4uGiSj1-1PaIttX

The artist is either a speed skater, or a member of a korean boy band or an anime character. Or possibly it’s this one https://kpop.fandom.com/wiki/Lee_Ju_Yeon. Maybe a member of a group called SATRUDAY.

I have no idea. I like the song.

Doorlesshouse - Attacker

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 1k, robbed!

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0bXm9GjQh4BxwR4JS1foBL?si=b938a2e1aafd461c

Video Link: https://youtu.be/9UzAUr_8xsY?si=lYShNqpCI6B8Ejdm

Another video that looks like it is advertising for a cult. A murder cult.

Zhuang Dongru - Locke Kingdom

Country of Origin: China

Youtube Views: 328, more peole should have seen this by accident

Spotify Link: None.

Video Link: https://youtu.be/tVVWuU3QFx0?si=ROJgB7Z1dYqZ7YmL

I think it might be a theme song from a Chinese TV show about life at a Magic Academy. Lonely girl Harriet Potter?

NMIXX - Heavy Serenade

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 41 million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1404zSB6dqMIiStHLI7gg4?si=3f656e66fbf248d9

Video Link: https://youtu.be/6Ycn9qZK09I?si=tRFGxxekb-OyxJfV

If I wasn’t a cat this song would make me have feelings. Sad and uplifting at the same time.

even if I leave this Earth my heart will bloom again

Forestella - Armageddon

Also on the fake Eurivision Asia playlist

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 133k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/4H2yH9wi5Qq67ZxwUWbyor?si=c0aacafc98dd4593

Video Link: https://youtu.be/EXsv2vbAabo?si=3QlBQMIh2fbY_jNF

A song about watching the 1998 film by Michael Bay?

Total bonkers. It like Queen have been Isekaied as a South Korea boy band and forced to breed with Il Divo in a grimy lab somewhere.

Am I held for ransom all damaged and then some now everyone’s gone away I’m closing the graves

So many questions. Why were you closing the graves? Who made them and left them open.

They also do a cover of Bohemian Thingy and also Thriller by MJ!

Emei - Whats The Point

Country of Origin: What The States of America

Youtube Views: 113k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/5yYGr8R31sQLOMVIgNCnrN?si=33f88f2bc8dc46e1

Video Link: https://youtu.be/K-F_dlNpbro?si=Kb970H8k3feaTtTF

This cat feels your pain.

Banger.

Isiliel x NekRomantik - Liebestod

Country of Origin: Japan and Outer Space

Youtube Views: 5.4k in 2 days

Spotify Link: None

Video Link: https://youtu.be/25R8JZcNRgM?si=UUE4ZM6CGHK_-jHy

Our dark Goddess Isiliel has returned from the Outer Darkness. She is the openeer of the ways and I will be eaten first.

Just look at her giving the skull headpats!

Runners Up - The Dere Collection

Songs every bit as good but didn’t stick in my head the same way. So many angry, angry women.

Picturemegreen - eternity (deredere)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 2.7k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/5mOWH0Pwf9zmcAEpUt0QVN?si=efdc39fb99004aa6

Video Link: https://youtu.be/9ikga5c2na8?si=69jVrtOAlmuIK6DJ

A little bit of dreampop type vibe.

Scene Queen - Tracksuit (yandere)

Country of Origin: Gunmurrica

Youtube Views: 23k

Spotify Link: https://youtu.be/7XkrqEgLZYY?si=sn2pU9GhKNx4sPOR

Video Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0QXNgg60Ck504AdrheBAox?si=de1a0c5c6ad54b88

I detect bloodlust.

Daisy Grenade - Emily (S Dere)

Country of Origin: Yruivenge States

Youtube Views: 44k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7rT2Y4ax4Wm7PulKRe8juC?si=7028a2ec8d7248f9

Video Link: https://youtu.be/RlIAg1lHN4g?si=wtxc8MxxfFXYZRDc

Mollie Elizabeth - Run Rabbit (Suano Cool)

Country of Origin: Between Mexico and Canadialand

Youtube Views: 405k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0xVSc4Gvf5ua1yb96Ku5D2?si=40816f807899479a

Video Link: https://youtu.be/KtGOy5nK8w8?si=PtdCBzQoe3TDBgy4

Don’t hate the girl, just hate the crome.

Madds Bucklet - Human to You (Yoidere?)

Country of Origin: Mainland Cuba

Youtube Views: 16k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3w9UGSchBtUIMi79wyG4QQ?si=8657b3862a134e4a

Video Link: https://youtu.be/gZ0u44zpjoQ?si=l6w_J_dj7UZaGeDA

Endmeow

Thank you for the two humans that read this far. Please leave suggestions for the next list in the comments section I don’t have.

entry.title: 2026 Eurovision Asia (Fake)
entry.summary: Introduction List based on countries confirmed to be taking part in Eurovision…
entry.content:
Introduction

List based on countries confirmed to be taking part in Eurovision Asia 2026 as of 16 May 2026. Songs found by searching youtube for /countryname/ + pop + playlist.

If I have the wrong country I remind you that I am a cat and care not for human geography.

All songs from the last year. Picked if they had some kind of Eurovision vibe.

Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5dzc1DLuqaMOhB8uGmS74C?si=XkfLt_d8SOGqSRSfxQ-n5g

YouTube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V6_6v7Is9wZsuRu-QcRFX3YT&si=tbtFNoHkDNhzhRkr

Habib Wahid X Mehrnigori Rustam - Moha Jadu - Bangladesh

Youtube Views: 64 million! https://youtu.be/UghMf59vDJM?si=-r9uTJ8P4zS0mPTa

Seems to be a love song. Violins. Sparkly dresses. Local instruments. Drum machine

My lover charms like a magician Like a wizard casting spells

Such beautiful lyrics.

I think the male singer is Bangladeshi Rylan?

Ngawang Thinley - RAM TANGAY - Bhutan

Youtube Views: 1 million https://youtu.be/mg4USoD2nlM?si=LV7XZyH4cOK2p_S4

A bad man. A Bhutanese Princess in distress. A fight and a chair on fire. Very Eurovision.

ង៉ក់-NGORG - តន់ ចន្ទសីម៉ា - Cambodia

Youtube Views: 77k https://youtu.be/McLq0PjZHgg?si=iEFBMW5igdeOZfPs

Aiming for the cat vote for sure. It has mine.

Not what I was expecting from Cambodia.

Only 77k views, deserves so many more.

T’JAME UNO - คู่กรรม - Laos

Youtube Views: 353k https://youtu.be/ZHLtcca2CDU?si=osJVM7BtYB9-peaV

A true love story based on the director’s life. I presume ther moral of the story is to avoid having a moustache while trying to date?

I don’t really understand what is happening.

Voice of Baceprot - RENEGADE SHEEP - Malaysia

Youtube Views: 137k https://youtu.be/tW0csWoixbQ?si=WXc5v8REX3k6cS0W

A song about being a murder ovine. Heck Yeh! Metal!!!

SAGEnomore - Samaya / समय - Nepal

Youtube Views: 66k https://youtu.be/blbuccTHZ8M?si=8bQVmMmCOEhbAcpk

A woman that likes to read. A watch. Possibly an unexplained death. Not really sure. I was expecting bald people chanting like Asian yodellers.

DIV9 - Summer of You - Philippines

Youtube Views: 1.8k (It’s very new) https://youtu.be/50ISB4v6XHU?si=9ico736lCGORhmgT

Not quite Brat Summer of You

포레스텔라(Forestella) - Armageddon [더 시즌즈-성시경의 고막남친] - South Korea

Youtube Views: 166k (by kpop standards that’s poor) https://youtu.be/EeDF-bhfr_A?si=pLzET-0bQvkUOSeG

Korean pretty boys channel the spirit of Freddie Mercury. Every Eurovision needs a bit of Epic Operatic Gibberish. This is that. Maybe it’s about the film?

I think they do a version of Bohemian Thingwotsit. Too difficult to spell.

DICE ‘- โซ๊ะ เดิ้น (SO DERN)’ - Thailand

Youtube Views: 605k https://youtu.be/J07WNboI0Sk?si=majBvWkS2mD0v7XC

So much eurovision vibe. I think the pretty boys might be challenging the pretty girls to a battle of some sort; Pokemon perhaps? Possibly zombies.

Quỳnh Anh Shyn - ĐIỀU CẦN ĐẾN - Vietnam

Youtube Views: 335k https://youtu.be/uqVKlOMSLfs?si=Kb5xQuFKHV8mgRj3

Dreamy pop lunacy.

Blue (Turquoise?) and Red have a fight in the snow. Then yellow appears with a pair of laser sunglasses.

Endmeow

Will update list as new countries are added.

This is just a taste of what Eurovision Asia could be like!

entry.title: 2026 April: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: Introduction Introduction and Links Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0vfacMx1kjWaVJxorzvxnO?si=dEUj73w8Txy45JQx3uZzmA Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V68UnIT90vck2v56vDrp0Hly&si=gpdA8Qf24BJdK4S_ Initial Shortlist:…
entry.content:
Introduction

Introduction and Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0vfacMx1kjWaVJxorzvxnO?si=dEUj73w8Txy45JQx3uZzmA

Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V68UnIT90vck2v56vDrp0Hly&si=gpdA8Qf24BJdK4S_

Initial Shortlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V6992pCwV0PvbDWX4N-Ke2Fy&si=p5l3Jq206wI9EH6f

664 songs listened to at time of writing. Mostly youtube and a few on bandcamp.

Mellow Midsommar Vibes

Some songs are just here for the chill vibes.

Welcome to camp Midsommar please enjoy your relaxing time in the flensorium.

AKMU - Paradise of Rumours

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 8.5 million, good grief it had 30 odd when I looked at it initially.

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/5dxiriLgC9mu2FbSNqudld?si=48fde613f0994c0e

Video Link: https://youtu.be/D54StAZFUrc?si=05NUvUf2CBZPK4vT

The couple who form this band are known as ‘The Nation’s Siblings’ in South Korea. They came first in K-Pop Star in 2014. Looking forward to seeing them at the Summerisle festival next year.

1415 - This Life Feels Ruined

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 855

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7e4kQ0rFWMazzPRHaib9qq?si=68138e1f0d764b47

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Mb8NZqDKjj4?si=v8sEVO82KaS2pA_U

One for the Fujoshi I think. They can decide who is ruining whose life.

o.j.o - One Day

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 13k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3dx0zVkgHuuKFqt6W7atEj?si=9af40b698cbd445d

Video Link: https://youtu.be/YaikfqpoCAg?si=flaheG0xfncsDiFh

Totally worth it for the wurb blurb woob sound in the middle. A song about a chance encounter with these lyrics:

We’re attracted to some people But unlike them you made me beautiful Had nothing to lose until I found you I wonder who are you

Be that person. If you are a person. If you’re a fellow cat don’t bother.

Spunky Pop Princesses

According to the dictionary it means courage and determination.

URBANGARDE - A Thousand Libidos

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 7.4k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1Ucw2a9OZsf6jZoCpkPbjM?si=7ecaf473355c4108

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Ar1STYMmfvk?si=X_u0ojCwYYNMSimU

Why so many you may ask.

Go search for a thousand libidos on the internet. Please don’t let me know how you got on.

Cherry Bomb - Digital Girl

Country of Origin: Disunited State of Murrikkka

Youtube Views: 4527. That’s a disgrace. This song is a total bop.

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3GpQ2bhljJkAF1IXaShbMh?si=7e70331ff1464026

Video Link: https://youtu.be/2F80V1BL_aQ?si=ktODRGHsljXm4nfs

If I wasn’t already a happily married cat I would be too scared to marry her. Go give this song some love.

Body Type - And What Else?

Country of Origin: Oz

Youtube Views: 5.3k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3QhtHCqnpNHKxNPAKjHs8b?si=8074ed3c2f3f4d0d

Video Link: https://youtu.be/CiY8XsG0YHk?si=ZddCisvbcSAuxUUf

Don’t seek validation from others. Force it upon them.

Thus spake Stanley.

Me.

Slice of Life

Life. Sliced.

The Reytons - Jukebox

Country of Origin: Airstrip One

Youtube Views: 13k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/55Spk24hrHyn10Npv84bQY?si=2cc0ff6973ae4fcf

Video Link: https://youtu.be/GMzzbsxtRvw?si=inJCyon5wDMIc4Dx

Pubcore.

Chinese American Bear - Turn Up The Radio

Country of Origin: Murikka

Youtube Views: 5.7k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6t9nPEkzsdNixwdHKrmxsZ?si=2340b9e617f24e50

Video Link: https://youtu.be/nTfjjjrg2yc?si=MxHa9BQQFDSFuVxJ

Chill.

The Redemptions - Lullaby

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 580

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6iO1Ig5yQW41oebzcIOdI0?si=f00e5e8de5c64b50

Video Link: https://youtu.be/hbEpmEsrguM?si=ecOgHThNcW0JGEvR

Can not get this tune out my head.

Final Song

Whee In - The Symphony of Fxxkboys

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 147k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/52KygGkyBwayKKdv7gDAdP?si=7dd32caa78ad455a

Video Link: https://youtu.be/SEfaaN6Io5Y?si=fzQ2irHAc2e6bhDf

I expect this kind of thing from the TPop crowd.

I learned that the xx in English is pronounced ‘uc‘.

I don’t know why I needed South Korea to tell me that.

Up Runners

HANRORO - Game Over?

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 5.1million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3Ce7m66BjXf97IDrvUVGbP?si=06913d4778bc41eb

Video Link: https://youtu.be/qrzKsS-4lZo?si=ZsnLzmTTxd5Mwqth

Featured image. I like the vibe.

Najam Soo, Moonsun - Give me a Sin / Official

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 1.5k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1Z7ppeuMBD3yZwSKfl0c1I?si=9adcc927df9e4b0d

Video Link: https://youtu.be/5vH7NOeulUE?si=A4pS8f7WIA007CbF

I like the quirkiness but I think the title should probably be ‘Give me a sign’ given the nature of the video. But maybe not. wwwwwwww

Royel Otis - Sweet Hallelujah

Country of Origin: Oz

Youtube Views: 117k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6EoD3qpTgNtwXNqamzLCn5?si=465a801d35a14e03

Video Link: https://youtu.be/niTy_ulUry0?si=P_1K0OFJVzu7D5-0

This song just gets better the more I listen to it.

Also cats on the single cover.

Double plus good.

Outro

The Longlist is superb. I had great trouble picking the songs for the final ten.

entry.title: 2026 March: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: 2026 March: Stanley’s Music Listicle Introduction and Links Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6U6IRS7PH5hs0HWooKQd2F?si=yHnf6WDyTWKA5IhYS_A3hQ https://shorturl.at/qPuBI…
entry.content:
2026 March: Stanley’s Music Listicle

Introduction and Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6U6IRS7PH5hs0HWooKQd2F?si=yHnf6WDyTWKA5IhYS_A3hQ

https://shorturl.at/qPuBI

Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V681sF_TjN5IFTyj0nf83_9V&si=e_9oJQeFmdpipMkw

https://shorturl.at/2eXhI

Initial Shortlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTaOJcv49V6-um-0LFrI155Ila\_TImwBB&si=xN4WM-_tz7nrLLfg

https://shorturl.at/kfokU

The Hu released a track this month. Didn’t even get to the longlist!

Trident - Sugars Song

Country of Origin: No idea

Youtube Views: 9

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/5dfZRevvebO6IfeVBS5Frr?si=fac13bd6755b49fb

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Dotb5cL-yGA?si=jdR7a-NAR2r3q9Wb

Can’t find a video. I’m not even really sure who the artist is. I’ve searched for Trident on multiple sites. The seems to be two million artists called Trident none of whom sound like one another and all of which are filed under the name Trident. It could be written by a deranged AI for all I know. I’m pretty sure they mess up rhyming onions & bunions. But I like the bassline vibe.

Blue Medusa - Checkmate

Country of Origin: United States of Dystopia

Youtube Views: 240k today

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0fN3tONYZxGcuwyr5IoTZ1?si=0a11abb45add42cd

Video Link: https://youtu.be/T21hSKREXGk?si=UBnqdkfeYaQ_LJzq

Another music video where no one knows how to dress themselves properly. Debut single from the new band of a well known death metal singer.

:devilfingersemojji:

The Suicide Diary - Dum Dum

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 101 (total, not 101k,)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7LejDiEo66ywqax0uwYAQp?si=ca08783e279c47bf

Video Link: https://youtu.be/FBRhjXYSP4I?si=6skDi_Zf1dailjzp

bandcamp link to buy the EP https://thesuicidediary.bandcamp.com/album/el-pino.

It’s like dreampop and shoegaze had a slightly depressed baby.

Rolling Quartz - Red Hot

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 274k, I think half of them might be my toe beans pressing F5

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/07yMRUY7PvOsPHqPw8S6v6?si=d1e67f35ab204706

Video Link: https://youtu.be/6J7K9Wi8uJ4?si=ncH-18mCJJp6PErZ

I like this pop / rock / slightly metal song. I like the video. For some reason the drummer in the video absolutely cracks me up. Hence in this list. There’s also a joke about poop I don’t understand.

The Warning - Kersone

Country of Origin: Mexico

Youtube Views: 1.1 million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2xixXiLYi3FsNF0m9vEV2G?si=314c9e32190840a4

Video Link: https://youtu.be/xGRH6MvX2Oo?si=Qp_cM43snzQQC-BY

Thelma and Louise make a band and become arsonists.

Heck yeah!

SuperKidd - I Can’t Die Like This

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 88 (I think it is an old song and they have reupped the video?)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/05HmaFum17FnnXNiTYzWDG?si=1b417dbc45b840c9

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Us14O0llRfE?si=j75pWmR1Hi39tytZ

Earwormed me. It’s from 2010 when they were called SUPER KIDD according to Spotify. Here’s a link to thei rmost popular song on Spotify https://open.spotify.com/track/28q2WpSin10XGVcyrpYCK8?si=0a96640797fe479c

Disco is back, baby.

SEVDALIZA - STRONG BECAUSE YOU ARE

Country of Origin: Iranian (Also Dutch)

Youtube Views: 22k (I think it’s a reup)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3qyiGu03ppAuBbUbDHBKU4?si=ef233e59aa5240ec

Video Link: https://youtu.be/rEUEGALuBjg?si=QeWi5WuRiluSF9YR

In this list because of the Ukraine amendment to the Morning Crescent Compendium, Appendix III of 2020.

Sounds like a Eurovision contender.

周震南 (Vin Zhou) - Yuck (ex member of R1SE)

Country of Origin: China

Youtube Views: 531 (form a channel with more than half a million subscribers)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6EmIKmE9tRyXeu3Zzmd3r5?si=08b1aa0ade494cd1

Video Link: https://youtu.be/mrwav9nCLjQ?si=PukSwfsGeLObEJHG

The video has rats, traffic cones, teddy bears and all sorts of stuff happening. I don’t really know what it is about but I am here for it.

There may also be a man dressed as a giant baby?

Dragon Pony (드래곤포니) - Oh Perfect!(아 마음대로 다 된다!)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 5.7k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3LKZCLEnspadu6UQIOTPVD?si=b0545e0bc75d4fec

Video Link: https://youtu.be/qcuKFGbiLlo?si=mrHpC5HFhdYcZy-R

I’m sure this is a great time for Korean boy bands to be releasing music. Quite certain there won’t be any competition …

Mayumura Chiaki (眉村ちあき) - again

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 13k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1aseYWvk8nyKCLYIBkMyRr?si=a0f0bd42628c45e9

Video Link: https://youtu.be/xcYIrjg5je8?si=RMrs_YTNvG-UDP_O

Sometimes when lounging in the sun I see the fattest of my humans dancing like this.

It’s distressing.

Runners Up: Big Guns

A couple of significant acts released songs that never made it into the top ten

BTS (방탄소년단) - SWIM

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 62 million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/68lbSrXDORS51pmyjZv712?si=2f8289e218c84fc3

Video Link: https://youtu.be/b4iVv91Z6lY?si=4mHjVGL_J0wkVuqv

It’s BTS. They’re quite popular.

Ado - AiAiA

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 1.4 million

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/10HeYTTDc5jxAnjRwWfwIe?si=3d4560e59e764f04

Video Link: https://youtu.be/_8CNByAq1n4?si=rfaDxJsJjdZmHi6J

The mysterious Ado releases this odd number from the deranged circus music genre. The 1Tak video is the best version.

Toxicitiyuri

For some reason all these songs clumped in my head. I don’t know why.

MYERA - Crushproof

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 160k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/4zD29sxTjNyFIrvmcvIiKf?si=2ed98d7e2dda4bea

Video Link: https://youtu.be/LGr1l9yOhC8?si=_iMrbAR5y5xLJiIf

I don’t need a boy.

YENA (최예나) - 캐치 캐치 (Catch Catch)

Country of Origin: South Korea

Youtube Views: 1.2 million

Spotify Link: https://youtu.be/NOiyDlWl534?si=iD3jwetCTMwRtbbD

Video Link: https://youtu.be/NOiyDlWl534?si=iMq7pPSDvmyuBNDz

Catch catch my heart, heart goes up down down heart goes up down down …

Da daradada

Sakurazaka46 - Dried fruit

Country of Origin: Japan

Youtube Views: 459k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/5DrxCKjopmd7UL1pJWqBHK?si=a3876d5f07ca4b52

Video Link: https://youtu.be/iCjPelKCm7w?si=n8XfMBssWZPZCsv0

“An everlasting life only ends up not knowing what to do with it. “

A different philosophy from YENA

Endings

All flesh is grass and therefore this edition comes to an end.

So many good songs never made it on this list. POLKADOT STINGRAY with ‘Boy Boy’ was robbed.

Listen to the long list and let me know if you think anything should have made it in.

Stanley.

A Cat. Nyaa.

After Endings

Jduck - i hate you SO

Country of Origin: Thailand

Youtube Views: 75k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3LqTSlBTBQLDx6w4jmrw8d?si=1a6b76ae87a3424d

Video Link: https://youtu.be/Vvtiivhgdio?si=73JHruOhbNgImRzt

I forgot this one.

Also.

pami - cry jar

Country of Origin: Thailand

Youtube Views: 117k

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2jFbCjRBcwxpV6shKMujVp?si=dc8effb981ca4c6e

Video Link: https://youtu.be/u8r6H6_hunw?si=OJQHO86dfyHbNyX-

Two brutal dis tracks. One of them might be by a duck.

entry.title: 2026 Feb: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: 2026 Feb: Stanley’s Music Listicle Introduction and Links Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0pB1P1h0QDzfy1WRV4uVKH?si=6OtF9g7ZR62SyV96MB1yWg Tidal…
entry.content:
2026 Feb: Stanley’s Music Listicle

Introduction and Links

Spotify Playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0pB1P1h0QDzfy1WRV4uVKH?si=6OtF9g7ZR62SyV96MB1yWg

Tidal Playlist: https://tidal.com/playlist/e4e514b7-0171-4ed5-99df-3d3ff55ef501

Youtube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGdExAWayyzL0qqu4kcYhHInV-QAsXT7y&si=GwR7MznfMJb1UCR9

Initial Shortlist: https://tidal.com/playlist/e8b39aa8-9015-4a07-bcc0-9b9566a13f73

A slightly more eclectic list than last time. Apart from song titles. There’s two called good boy. I don’t know why. Some of the songs may not actually be new, they may have just been recently uploaded to YouTube.

This list will answer the question “What if Japanese but Irish?”

Phantom Siita - Rose Coloured Moon

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2Diqv4GLQ8pS66JhwsTGLl?si=3e6a7352339048db

Video Link: https://youtu.be/wg71amM8LUo

Cats love Phantom Siita. They are all cats. I don’t know what they’re singing about but I imagine it’s about loving someone so much they’re going to murder them and keep them preserved in something.

I don’t know it’s just that vibe.

Meek - Fabulous

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1LkpaAtSjAx5n4rrTkIQyu?si=9b7c2152d28b45ee

Video Link: https://youtu.be/x-FLnQrUGTc

To be honest it’s not that good but I imagine it would be good fun to sing along to when you’re half cut. So one for the students.

A wee quote from EDGE Media Network:

“MEEK is described as a self-made artist whose work is informed by working-class experience and personal trauma. She has explicitly stated that her music is intended to resonate with outsiders and marginalized audiences, including LGBTQ+ listeners, centering their experiences and perspectives in her artistic vision. “

AKASAKI - Action

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1Dp1j8ohcjGTJhswwYWl5u?si=38bf16b078f54e6f

Video Link: https://youtu.be/80sNX81Kags

Earworm. Worms in the ears.

Worms, worms, worms.

Next.

THE SSYNDROME - Good Boy

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/4V38s6GgpCkwXx8vZm4sxw?si=fe630204734147bd

Video Link: https://youtu.be/6QmFwtS_oNU

Look at their profile https://kprofiles.com/the-ssyndrome-members-profile/ they look so edgy.

The song is pretty catchy but I just loved the bit where he says “Don’t call me Good Boy” and then a voice whispers “Good boy”. It cracks me up. I don’t know why. I even had an anime panel all ready to to go with an image of an M boy pretending to be a dog for an S girl.

Then I thought better of it.

Don’t Google that.

Not at work.

Then I discovered another song called Good Boy.

Mind blown.

4EVE - Girls Like Me

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7fjGhOyRcSNTYgJRMmpr1f?si=2714cd13674546d7

Video Link: https://youtu.be/7PRzq5gNBSI

4EVE are a Thai girl group that were formed after surviving a reality TV show. https://kprofiles.com/4eve-members-profile/ I imagine it was Battle Royale but with more lip gloss.

Apparently “Girls like me don’t play with the boys like you!”

Having looked at them I’m a little relieved as I think they would eat me alive.

Also I’m a cat.

akaikurage - Idea (Donare!!)

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1z2ZA7ef1OFWAGq0RM9jPp?si=9f9112151ab94ba8

Video Link: https://youtu.be/k8I8rU_xoZU

The YouTube video is about 3 minutes shorter than the actual song.

The Dead Kennedys, but Japanese. That’s not quite right.

“A Japanese psychedelic new wave POP art rock band. Natsuki (Gt. Vo) and Matsuna (Ba) met and decided that they wanted to express something together whether it be comedy. dance or whatever. and since they could both play instruments. they decided to make music and that was the beginning of Akai Kurage. In 2019 they met Gell-C (current drummer) and formed the current lineup. Their addictive vocals create a unique worldview and their songs are catchy. During their live performances they ignore the music and start to scream and lament. which intertwines with the audience. The power of the guitars bass and drums is unique to this band and they seem to be able to twist the contemporary music scene.”

LANDOKMAI - Fall In Love Too Easily

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0rVPjrssMtRriOlhqhlno4?si=68d0cef9537f4691

Video Link: https://youtu.be/ipmf-OHEQsc

But Doug^H^H^H^HStanley you say, remembering that I’m a cat and not his human. There’s not been a good romantic song yet (with the possible exception of Rose-coloured Moon, but we’re not sure) and Feb is the month of Valentines. The romance not the murdering …

Don’t you have a good romance song?

Why yes, and this is it. There’s even a special Valentine’s edit of the video. I’ve not watched it. It might make me feel things.

LANDOKMAI are a Thai pop duo.

Maybe I need something a little depressing.

Indigo la end - Kagura

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/2bjxsWamHhhbNkw3s0ONfW?si=f93206613ea7416a

Video Link: https://youtu.be/TqHFhXwI10k

Hooked me in the first 5 seconds then funked me over so hard it’s still living in my head rent free.

From JRock News:

“The new single, Kagura, as usual, features an upbeat rock composition from guitarist and vocalist Enon Kawatami. The dynamic guitar arrangements and catchy vocal melodies, which fans adore, are once again present in Kagura.

Released the following Friday, the action-packed music video for Kagura follows an exciting chase scene from a first-person perspective. In the midst of frantic action scenes, the band can be seen playing their instruments in a moody, dimly lit space.”

Saint Agness - Good Boy

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/7jNPucAt0pO6oAJNWVHsj9?si=66a6650213c142fa

Video Link: https://youtu.be/alv7eMqL3pQ

I’m not sure if she is an official Saint?

From Metal Heads Forever:

“Frontperson Kitty A. Austen explains, “‘Good Boy’ was written to be a scathing critique of obedient, subservient men who uphold the capitalist death cult, feed the machine, and call it a virtue. It’s a snarling takedown of the so-called ‘good boys’ who suck corporate dick and wear their complicity like a badge.””

Kitty!

GENDAI FUFUU - Vessel of Family

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/3lpMwHJZBt5g9w51Tv36g7?si=0c5cf341b0534c33

Video Link: https://youtu.be/9Kh5LIGzmLk

“A band consisting of two married couples. Formed in 2024 by eri-nyo, who is in charge of lyrics, composition, keyboards, and vocals for CUICUI and IIOT. The members are eri-nyo, eri-nyo’s husband Yuichi Ishikawa/guitar (ANIMA, IIOT) , miduho/drums (Response,CUICUI) , and her husband Ryosuke/bass (THE FLAMES). By performing songs that incorporate jazz and classical elements with members from rock and pop backgrounds, they have sublimated them into a unique, modern sound.”

More worms.

Runner Ups

What If Japanese But Irish? : Backdrop Cinderella - Suudarabushi

Spotify Link: https://tidal.com/track/492831691/u

Video Link: https://youtu.be/TScMdB66h_4

I think this may be a cover version but really have no idea. Listen to it and watch the video. Maybe it’s because they are both an island nation? From the JaME site:

“Formed in Ikebukuro in 2006, Backdrop Cinderella play an eccentric, fast-paced brand of punk rock that combines influences from ska, metal, Irish and folk music with some truly ridiculous lyrics. Energetic frontman Dendeke Ayumi dances, jumps and hangs upside down from the ceiling while he sings, and he is backed up by the more soulful voice of afro-hairstyled guitarist Toshima “Perry” Wataru and the high-pitched shouts of bassist Asahi Kyanako, which add an even more eclectic feel to their sound.

After over a decade together, Backdrop Cinderella have never changed members or deviated from their vision, bringing fans more wild and irreverent songs each year. The members have adopted the phrase “unza unza” to describe both their sound and the free and instinctive way that fans dance to it.”

Just Watch The Video: NETH PRIERE CAIN - Majestic Aria

Spotify Link : https://open.spotify.com/track/5zW4Ae3cCNtHdLkY9gkFsg?si=4509c017cae64947

Video Link: https://youtu.be/NfVXGnRFYaM?si=g3-bGTz48q520Mks

Visual Kei indeed.

The Chuuni Five Make A Band.

“NETH PRIERE CAIN is an active visual kei band in Nagoya. They are part of the kote kei, shiro kei, and tanbi kei subgenres. They have been active since 2018.”

Sure that explains everything.

Wormed Too Late: Genesis Owusu - STAMPEDE

Spotify Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6gxGg4j7i3Ba7F2x0yi8br?si=3518186dede147bc

Video: Link: https://youtu.be/69nnHQVl40g?si=z2hUt_U96TZ99el-

I presume this is a public information video about the dangers of riding horses and motorbikes without a helmet?

From the Wiki:

“Kofi Owusu-Ansah (born 1998), known by his stage name Genesis Owusu, is a Ghanaian-Australian rapper and singer from Canberra. He is the younger brother of fellow hip hop rapper, Kojo Owusu-Ansah p.k.a. Citizen Kay. Owusu’s debut studio album, Smiling with No Teeth (March 2021), reached the ARIA Albums Chart top 30. At the 2021 ARIA Music Awards he won four trophies for Album of the Year, Best Hip Hop Release, Best Independent Release and Best Cover Art (latter shared with Bailey Howard). “

Endings

Anything released after today will have to wait until March.

Total songs considered: 263

Shortlist: 45 songs

The view count on these songs varies wildly from under 500 to millions!

Nyaa. Today is Neko Day in Japan.

Stanley.

entry.title: 2026 Jan: Stanley's Music Listicle
entry.summary: Stanley’s Music Listicle - 2026 Jan This is a bit early you…
entry.content:
Stanley’s Music Listicle - 2026 Jan

This is a bit early you might be thinking. It’s not. My relase playlist is almost 200 songs and my review for inclusion in the top ten is almost 60 songs long.

These might not all be new songs but they appeared on Youtube at some point in the last few weeks. Anything released between now and Feb has probably missed it’s chance.

Links

Spotify Playlist https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3nlkMzqXexy0oXzzeoC4R2?si=KwQZFBk1TpWOobfmGVhzbw

Youtube Playlist https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGdExAWayyzLQ9151E5AwctVpigqe6Vkd&si=FF_CMa1iJw-YqHCG

You’ll Melt More! - Rock’n Bocchi / ゆるめるモ！『ロックンぼっち』

https://youtu.be/nRcr9cqxLmI

Not on Spotify but great fun. Do the dance!

酒神楽 (Fathomless Skywalker) -SAKEKAGURA- (feat.かえるはかせ from JAPANESE FOLK METAL)

https://youtu.be/oGufzYxXxYc

Not on Spotify I am afraid You’ll have to look at the YouTube list.

Unlucky Morpheus - 万華鏡

https://youtu.be/bMSpe_3ONV4

Not on Spotify.

Starts out as something and then changes. Always nice to see a metal / rock / visual kei type band with a violinist!

츄 (CHUU) - XO, My Cyberlove

https://youtu.be/qME5xxExaDw

I don’t even like this song but I know all the English words and have listened to it at least a million times. Sometimes I shame myself.

It’s also on my youtube playlist twice somehow! Found another. That’s three. It’s actually Youtube short of the dance practice!

Official髭男dism - Make Me Wonder

https://youtu.be/LU7xD_yx43c

Well now I’ve found a song that’s managed to push CHUU out of my frontal lobes for a while.

Cherry Bomb - “Never Be Me (M★therf★cker)”

https://youtu.be/aTL7X_tJvBU?si=6dYUUy7krRVtXcdN

I have no idea how this song ended up on my playlist.

HOLOSOIL – Spirals

https://youtu.be/cohqmrw5mm0?si=0UkG2Y0zQvFCTTPs

This might be good or it might be for teenage Chunni edgelords. I don’t know. I am cat.

POPPY - Time Will Tell

https://youtu.be/iM4oQWX-AaM?si=yPDTcwbl5pSC0fXA

I’m very late to the Poppy party. But I’m here for it now.

The Greats

There’s a few of my favourite artists released songs this month. I’ll put them all here or they will just take over too much of the chart.

YOASOBI - 「アドレナ」

https://youtu.be/ARqP5ohiubY

If you don’t love YOASOBI we can’t be friends. I’m sorry.

YOASOBI - 「BABY」

https://youtu.be/tWqZxTAy7rU

Sorry but I love them too much.

HANABIE. - ICONIC

https://youtu.be/JT_NgMk9n-4

So pink and cat eared and loud.

ano - 「ピカレスクヒーロー」

https://youtu.be/rs2WNAF2w54

She’s fighting inflatazilla in real life and a computer game and playing metal music with them and becoming a giant girl. Watch.

Honourable Mentions

BABYMETAL - ヘドバンギャー！！ 15th Night Ver.

https://youtu.be/R09cXutHYCM

A rerelease but still max Babymetal! Not on Spotify.

ZORN - 【Freak】

https://youtu.be/yX8HFJWBh_k

I don’t know who ZORN but this might grow on me. I’ve added it to the Spotify list.

日向坂46 - 『クリフハンガー』

https://youtu.be/1QDWU8leVQw

I would like to join this cult. Where do I sign up?

TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA / Ruby on the edge (VS. AiNA THE END)

https://youtu.be/CKwudw1bxZk

Big band Japanese ska with an up and coming singer who had one of the best songs of last year.

ILLIT (아일릿) - ‘Sunday Morning’

https://youtu.be/-01oDwXKSuE

14 Million YouTube views can’t be wrong!

Endmeow

That’s it. A mixed bag.

I’m off to watch a cartoon for two hours.

entry.title: Stanley's List Of Near Purrfect B Movies
entry.summary: Stanley’s List of Favourite Fillums Introduction In no real order. Not really…
entry.content:
Stanley’s List of Favourite Fillums

Introduction

In no real order. Not really planning on defining b-movie but aiming for a vibe. Not big budget films, bit of a horror feel usually and an easy hook to describe it to someone.

Tremors ( & Tremors 2)

Giants worms devour a Chinese shop-keeper in a desolate American town.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/tremors & https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/tremors-ii-aftershocks

Starting with the best. Only the first two films are actually good. There is a hard to find spin off TV series and a dedicated fan base.

Deep Rising

Giant wormy things from the depths of the sea eat the rich while a ragtag bunch of petty crooks try to survive.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/deep-rising

Imagine if Ryan-air did cruise ships. They would be like this.

Deep Blue Sea

LL Cool J outlives Samuel L Jackson

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/deep-blue-sea

Super intelligent sharks learn how to open a giant can of humans. I believe there are circles but suspect they are awful.

Lake Placid

Official Golden Girls sequel, but with more Crocogator.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/lake-placid

There’s a crocodile. in a lake, that’s developed a taste for people. What more do you need. Possibly the best 82 minutes you’ll have.

Theatre of Blood

A ham actor gets his revenge on his cruel critics.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/theatre-of-blood

Is this a clever deconstruction of British class and society via the medium of 1970s horror? No. Best avoided if you love dogs.

The Monkey

Like the Final Destination films but with a toy monkey.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/the-monkey

Summary: See tagline.

The Colour Out of Space

Isolated farming family learn not to drink the water.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/color-out-of-space

Mainly here because it has Nicholas Cage and is a Lovecraft inspired film. I was tempted to put in Re-animator but that has not aged well at all.

Slither

Space slugs!

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/slither

Space slugs!!

Ghost Squad (ゴーストスクワッド )

Dead girls demand revenge

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/ghost-squad-2018

Again maybe not one to watch if you love dogs. I almost suggested the Virgin Psychics ( https://www.rottentomatoes.com/m/the_virgin_psychics_2015 ) or The Happiness of the Katakuris ( https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/the-happiness-of-the-katakuris ).

If you like this you might like early noughties Japanese extreme gore but probably not.

Iron Sky ( and Iron Sky: The Coming Race if you must )

Moon Nazis invade Lady Trumps America.

Link: https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/iron-sky

So far into the so bad it’s good category it almost comes back round to bad again. The sequal has Hitler, Margaret Thatcher and Dinosaurs in it. Also a very unsubtle jab at iPhone fans.

Hook

I could have out in so many more films:

Kung Fu Hustle (https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/kung-fu-hustle) (Poor people fight kung-fu people resist crime-fu gangs) should probably replace Slither.

Jennifer’s Body (https://www.justwatch.com/uk/movie/jennifers-body) (Revenge of the zombie demon babe) should probably be up here too as a forgotten classic. It could replace Theatre of Blood?

Stanley.

entry.title: 2025 Dec: Stanley's End Of Year Top Songs
entry.summary: Top Ten End of Year Listicle Intro and Links Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7rS6bavwrW0yno0KeN9Ff9?si=79XQMYMzQAyaBDCMY8AxjA Youtube:…
entry.content:
Top Ten End of Year Listicle

Intro and Links

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7rS6bavwrW0yno0KeN9Ff9?si=79XQMYMzQAyaBDCMY8AxjA

Youtube: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGdExAWayyzKz1Ct-cCRmtSP088usuj3m&si=qjZCMUD7gD3NLZRK

According to ListenBrainz these are the songs I have listened to the most this year. I only downloaded ListenBrainz in April so it may not be acccurate. From 10 to 1 here goes.

GORI☆GORI Feez e-Girl!!

I am so ashamed this made it on. It’s not even the best song from the anime. Young school girl teams up with bitter older man to solve crimes. Moe Holmes indeed.

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/63MdWK5-Ogk?si=ift6G_l3aPC9X5Ha

Cold In Berlin - The Power (9 listens)

Thank you Deadinburgh for bringing this band to my ears. Scariest act I saw all year!

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/xB9q6V5H2_Y?si=mb9E4_6c6ew0O7t5

Aya Gloomy - RIKU NO KOTŌU (9 listens and saw her live, so 10)

It means Disappears Queitly. Super chill dreampop. Sort of.

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/63MdWK5-Ogk?si=ift6G_l3aPC9X5Ha

AQ - Me&You, Deep Diver, Fantastique (10, 11, 11 listens)

I listened to this album a lot. So putting these songs all together.

AQ do not seem to be on Spotify. Sorry. Nope tell a lie found it.

Or on YouTube! Also a lie https://www.youtube.com/@AQ_kyoto

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/S_T__mSfy8A?si=5BXXdQhL49PlmA1F

Anamanaguchi - Miku (11 actual listen, an infinite loop in my brain)

And now Lovecraft’s favourite singer is living in my head again. She’s not real but at least she’s not AI.

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/NocXEwsJGOQ?si=0DHTnE2W63BCaaF4

I keep singing along …

Thinking …

Miku …

Miku …

Mikthulhu.

Ado - Usseewa (11 Listens)

Usseewa mean ‘Shut Up’. This was Ado essentially saying to Japanese Society: Fuck You.

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/Qp3b-RXtz4w?si=2YkLT6uXNys5_Rxc

AQ - SKUMSCANSCUM (13 listens)

I have no idea what they’re singing about but I think they may be on the same page as Ado.

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/NuMMy0YCJl

BAND-MAID - Ready To Rock (31 Listens)

They’re dressed as maids. They are here to serve you hard rock Meowster!

Youtube Link: https://youtu.be/eapNDHKbu0M?si=j8f24PLwOcpbDe9x

Endings

That is my list.

If you don’t like it that’s fine. Suggest something better fo rme to listen to next year.

entry.title: 2025 Dec: Stanley's Christmas Soundtrack
entry.summary: Stanley’s Christmas Listicle Something old, something borrowed, something blue and something new…
entry.content:
Stanley’s Christmas Listicle

Something old, something borrowed, something blue and something new for Christmas? That sounds correct.

Here we have:

Old –> Celluloid: Best or worst Christmas films to watch.

Borrowed: Christmas cover songs by unlikely bands

New: Christmas themed stuff from a graze of recent release.

Blue: Random.

Celluloid

Die Hard is not a Christmas film. Not ending up on this list.

Krampus

Krampus (2015)

Probably the most heartwarming story of the true meaning of Christmas. It’s a classic.

Violent Night

Violent Night (2022)

What if Santa but John Wick. But not quite. It’s like that.

I think this may be a Netflix film, but despite that it is still fun. It has thingy in it, Lily Allen’s ex. I wonder if she has any opinions about him?

Lily Allen’s Thoughts

Santa Claus Conquers The Martians

Santa Claus … (1964)

Is this film suddenly more relevant because of the current political climate? Is it secretly a vintage gem that needs to be reconsidered? No to both these questions.

Gremlins

Gremlins (1984)

Why is this a Christmas film? Because it is.

Se7en

Se7en (1995)

It’s a Christmas film because he gets a present at the end. Christmas is all about giving.

Borrowed (covers)

Lady Gaga - Christmas Tree

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xVA4xBiUncI

Ozzy Osbourne and Jessica Simpson - Winter Wonderland

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nryo91pHK8s

Thankfully I can’t find a Spotify link.

Twisted Sister - Oh Come All Ye Faithful

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KPoFjACtd9o

By some definitions you could class Twisted Sister as a secret Christian Music group!

Christopher Lee - Little Drummer Boy

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hiRjmD9h-YY

New

You’ll Melt More - All Affirmative Concerto

https://youtu.be/rSGLu5YjgEM

Not on Spotify I am afraid. It looks Christian so it’s probably Christmassy? There’s crosses and stuff.

WayV - Eternal White

https://youtu.be/5RfCf1TV1Io

https://open.spotify.com/track/1dc9UVn5mc3UKbFzCml6v2?si=cf301b3ab1074806

These handsome boys are singing a song called Eternal White, that sounds Christmassy. Let’s watch the video.

…

Maybe not.

STARRY*NITE - Treasure Dreamer

https://youtu.be/8wTZBmxejCw

https://open.spotify.com/track/6HOo7YXT9SxdeJnz4i9N63?si=7fc56f339db243b6

Surely this song by a Thai Idol group will be festive because it’s called starry night and it is almost Christmas.

Turns out cat’s can’t read YouTube titles and the group is called Starry*Nite and the song is called Treasure Dreamer.

Lets watch the video and read the AI generated subs.

Well the subs keep telling me this is a song.

Literally one of the lines was

“my heart will fart as loud as it can!”

Song of the year.

WISH - Wish You A Merry Christmas

https://youtu.be/RtWnErqXV3A

https://open.spotify.com/track/4cmj9rRmJgF83wjVPoczXj?si=dd60329fdbf246e0

Ok Korea show us that you understand the meaning of Christmas.

Artist name: WISH - Check!

Song Name: Wish You A Merry Christmas - Check!

Video …

…

Well apparently the title is two thirds of the lyrics.

At least her heart has not farted …

カジヒデキ HIDEKI KAJI - みんなでサンタにキスをした！ WE ALL KISSED SANTA CLAUS

https://youtu.be/ruVakUotFm4

https://open.spotify.com/track/1Hhz3eN7pSJaJkTaxN0wux?si=8e79699359ca4042

I don’t know what is real any more.

Blue

I’m a cat and I am colourblind. I don’t really know what blue is.

hololive English - Last Christmas (Wham Cover)

https://youtu.be/I5oAT3lBYLU

No Spotify link

Hololive are a bunch of VTubers. Here is their cover of what is possibly the greatest Christmas song of all time.

Gayla Peevey - I Want A Hippopotamus for Christmas

https://youtu.be/57vrqCENNPc?si=6zVryMvfRhyZLShV

https://open.spotify.com/track/5P8Xvy5tzhmfyfA6GplQ8h?si=5f9d669e0cf14445

Some people just want their two front teeth for Christmas. Some girls want a Hippopotamus.

She’s done a few Christmas songs. They all of this quality.

Fountains of Wayne - I Want and Alien for Christmas

https://youtu.be/WyHE9gw6HdI

https://open.spotify.com/track/33O5sjotRAcT8nwOeYXXEm?si=453cd2e0a3714adb

When they weren’t all about Stacey’s Mom the Fountains were all about this.

Jarrod Alonge - 12 Days of a Pop-punk Christmas

https://youtu.be/BfxRWdz1a6w

https://open.spotify.com/track/3a0JYuE4yo9xtGon59a7t9?si=564d41e37347412c

I don’t know who this is. Nor do I know what this is. I very apologises.

Rise Against - Making Christmas

https://youtu.be/B0fqgiRu2eE?si=PiuIzynkJ_r3oztN

https://open.spotify.com/track/2VefiraA8HEZDWD2cKs5uQ?si=4de67a777aa44e71

I misread this and thought Rage Against the Machine had done a Christmas song.

I thought Spotify had shortened the band name because young people today can’t read long form text.

Playlist Links

Spotify List : https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5jHBBsX2QmamrnltMtTLI2?si=yM4b6nbPRkWWJuOfrLEL8w

Youtube List: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGdExAWayyzILP08cPyASPl4StqYRrjSw&si=XzS-o5PwQ_lnwJ61
